// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import java.lang.foreign.*
import java.lang.foreign.ValueLayout.*
import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativeLoader, Scratch, Layouts, StructAbiCheck, UpcallBridge}

final class ArrayBindingsImpl extends ArrayBindings:
    import ArrayBindingsImpl.*

    def sum(xs: Array[Int], n: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Int =
        val __kyoScratch$ = Scratch.currentFor("kyo.example.ArrayBindings", Scratch.configuredSize)
        val __kyoMark$ = __kyoScratch$.mark()
        try
            val xsSeg = MemorySegment.ofArray(xs)
            val errnoSeg = __kyoScratch$.alloc(4L, 4L, "kyo.example.ArrayBindings", "sum")
            val retVal: Int = sumMH.invokeExact(errnoSeg, xsSeg, n)
            retVal
        finally __kyoScratch$.reset(__kyoMark$)
end ArrayBindingsImpl

object ArrayBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.ArrayBindings")
    private val lib      = NativeLoader.load("kyo_arr")
    private val linker   = Linker.nativeLinker()
    private val capture  = Linker.Option.captureCallState("errno")
    private val hasCriticalApi: Boolean =
        try
            val _ = classOf[Linker.Option].getMethod("critical", classOf[Boolean])
            true
        catch case _: Throwable => false
    private val critOn: Linker.Option | Null =
        if hasCriticalApi then Linker.Option.critical(true) else null
    private def mkOpts(opts: Linker.Option | Null*): Array[Linker.Option] =
        opts.iterator.collect { case o: Linker.Option => o }.toArray

    private val sumMH: MethodHandle = linker.downcallHandle(
        lib.find("sum_ints").orElseThrow(),
        FunctionDescriptor.of(JAVA_INT, ADDRESS, JAVA_INT),
        mkOpts(capture, critOn)*
    )
end ArrayBindingsImpl
